title: This Tesla owner won $10k in court for Tesla’s FSD lies (Updated)
summary:
For over a decade now, Tesla has sold a promise of vehicles that can drive themselves, even stating that every car it produced had all the hardware for self-driving.

But after years of the company being unable to deliver, some owners want their money back. Ben Gawiser is one of those owners, who recently won a $10,600 judgment due to Tesla’s failure to deliver. But Tesla kept fighting to delay payment, even just a few days at a time.

(5/29 Update, original post 5/2: He finally got his money back. This article has been updated with new information below)

title: Blink and Kempower expand US East Coast EV fast charging
summary:
Kempower and Blink Charging are expanding their EV fast-charging partnership across the US East Coast, with 14 new charging sites planned through 2026.

summary:

title: Republicans devise another way to make electricity more expensive with new fees
summary:
As everything gets less affordable, republicans are proposing big new inspection fees for cheap energy projects, trying to protect their fossil fuel masters from the rise of better options.

title: BYD’s new electric SUV secures over 30,000 orders in its first week
summary:
The Yuan Plus, sold overseas as the Atto 3, is among BYD’s best-selling vehicles. After launching the third-generation model with a longer driving range and Flash Charging, BYD said the new EV received over 30,000 orders in one week.

title: Podcast: Tesla Robotaxi numbers, Ferrari’s controversial Luce launches, Waymo Ojai, and more
summary:
In the Electrek Podcast, we discuss the most popular news in the world of sustainable transport and energy. In this week’s episode, we discuss Tesla’s alarming Robotaxi numbers, Ferrari’s controversial Luce, Waymo Ojai, and more.

Today’s episode is sponsored by GM Energy. If you want to experience more resilience and control over your home energy, the GM Energy Home System adds stationary battery power for always-ready backup energy for your home, and the GM Energy PowerBank takes in energy from the grid and stores it for when you need it most. Learn more at gmenergy.gm.com

title: Anker SOLIX permanently cuts power station prices + exclusive bonus savings to lows, Lectric’s rare 30% extra battery sale lows, more
summary:
We’re closing out this week’s Green Deals (and May as a whole) with some notable last-of-the-month additional sales, with everything here and from weeks past still available to shop in our updated Memorial Day Green Deals hub through the weekend. Speaking of the weekend, Anker SOLIX currently has a large flash sale window that is seeing official and permanent price cuts across all its power stations + you’ll get low prices using our exclusive bonus savings code – all starting from $123. Right behind it, we have a refresher on Lectric’s soon-to-end Memorial Day Sale + a new Anniversary Sale with up to 30% discounts on extra batteries at their lowest prices starting from $210. Let’s not forget about our hangover Green Deals collected together at the bottom of the page, like yesterday’s EcoFlow May Monthly Madness Sale + the latest flash sale offers that end tonight, Segway’s GT3 Electric SuperScooter at a $1,500 low, and more.

Head below for other New Green Deals we’ve found today and, of course, Electrek’s best EV buying and leasing deals. Also, check out the new Electrek Tesla Shop for the best deals on Tesla accessories.

summary:
It’s a truck and SUV. GM said the Hummer X “redefines what a mid-size EV can do off-road,” previewing the new concept for the first time.

title: Toyota is scrapping plans to launch one of its most important EVs
summary:
The low-slung Lexus LF-ZC electric sedan is dead. Toyota is scrapping plans to launch the next-gen luxury EV, which was expected to enter production later this year with advanced new batteries and a dedicated platform.

title: Memorial Day Green Deals hub – EVs, power stations, electric tools, devices, and much more
summary:
If you missed the nationwide memo, today is Memorial Day, and as we spend this time with family and friends, remembering our fallen service members, so too are our favorite brands for a wide variety of eco-friendly tech offering tons of seasonal discounts across e-bikes, electric scooters, power stations, tools, appliances, smart devices, and more – many of which are at their best prices to date. We’ve collected all the ongoing deals together into this one-stop shopping hub to make things easier to find, and we will continue to update this hub for the next couple days, too. So head on down below to browse through all these Green Deals while they’re still around.

title: Rivian Says Fight Over Apple CarPlay Is 'Completely Obsolete' Thanks To AI
summary: Rivian says the tremendous progress of AI-powered voice assistants will make CarPlay a thing of the past.

title: Slate’s Sub-$30K Bare-Bones EV Truck Opens Preorders June 24—But There’s A Catch
summary: The company is taking $300 non-refundable deposits to secure a place in line for the first finished vehicles.

summary: The official count was revealed for the first time in registration information submitted by Tesla to the Texas DMV.

title: China Is Turning Against The EV Gimmicks It Helped Popularize
summary: Hidden handles, giant screens, yokes, and reclining seats make Chinese EVs feel futuristic. Now regulators are questioning their safety.

title: What EV Slowdown? Plug-In Cars Made Up 25% Of Car Sales Last Year
summary: The U.S. is getting left behind on electrification, a new report says. The rest of the world is charging ahead in 2026.

title: I Saw Ferrari’s First EV In The Flesh. Here’s My Honest Take
summary: The Ferrari Luce is here. The company's first EV costs 550,000 euros ($640,000) and looks like no Ferrari before it.

title: The Car You Barely Knew Existed Just Got A Big Overhaul, With Less Of Everything
summary: The first-generation VinFast VF 8 had a good price, but failed in just about every other category. Now, there’s a new one.

title: Lucid Bought Back This Air. It Was A Software Nightmare

title: This Could Be Lucid’s Affordable Crossover Next To A Tesla Model Y
